login.title: Shree Sai Krupa Kirana Store
login.subtitle: Milk Inventory & ERP System
login.email_error: Please enter a valid email address
login.guide: Enter your email address to access the dashboard. Demo account accepts any password.

dashboard.title: Shree Sai Krupa Kirana Store - Milk Inventory Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of today's status
dashboard.quick_guide: Use the navigation menu on the left to manage milk products, customers, daily deliveries, and view reports.

milk.title: Milk Inventory Manager
milk.subtitle: Manage milk types and standard prices
milk.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this milk item?
milk.guide: Define the milk variants you sell and their default unit prices. These prices will automatically apply to customer orders unless overridden.

customer.title: Customer Inventory
customer.subtitle: Manage store customers and their daily milk requirements
customer.name: Customer Name
customer.guide: Register customers with their daily delivery requirements. This makes generating daily checklists automatic.

daily.title: Daily Milk Checklist
daily.subtitle: Mark deliveries and update quantities for today
daily.guide: This list is automatically prepared for today. Check the box if delivery was successful. You can edit quantities inline if a customer ordered more/less today.

sales.title: Sales Performance Reports
sales.subtitle: Track revenue and filter by timeframes
sales.guide: View aggregated sales figures. Filter by date/month/year or drill down into specific customer accounts.

payments.title: Payment History Ledger
payments.subtitle: Track invoice statuses, payment methods, and pending dues
payments.guide: Maintain clear records of transactions. Mark transactions as complete/pending, and log payment modes (Cash or UPI) for accounting.
